{%- comment -%} Overrides the competitive-verifier theme's document_header.html to display paths with the leading "src/" stripped (headers are included with bare names via -I src), including in the include directive. {%- endcomment -%} {%- assign display_path = include.data.path | remove_first: "src/" -%} {%- if page.title and page.title != display_path -%} {%- capture page_title -%}{{page.title | xml_escape }} ({{ display_path | xml_escape }}){%- endcapture -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture page_title -%}{{display_path | xml_escape }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%} {%- comment -%} Catch2 unit tests are not verification files; mark them instead of the not-verified icon. {%- endcomment -%} {%- if include.data.path contains ".test.cpp" and include.data.path contains "src/" -%}

🧪 {{ page_title | xml_escape }}

{%- elsif include.data.pathExtension == "hpp" -%} {%- comment -%} For headers, the title is the include directive itself (click to copy). {%- endcomment -%}

{{ site.icons[include.data.verificationStatus] }} #include "{{ display_path }}"

{%- else -%}

{{ site.icons[include.data.verificationStatus] }} {{ page_title | xml_escape }}

{%- endif -%}

View this file on GitHub {%- if include.data.documentPath %}· View document part on GitHub{% endif %} · Last update: {{ include.data.timestamp }} {%- assign coverage_page = site.data.coverage_pages[include.data.path] %} {%- if coverage_page %}· Coverage report{% endif %} {%- if include.data.isFailed %}· {{ site.icons[include.data.verificationStatus] }} View error logs on GitHub Actions{% endif %}

{% if include.data.attributes.PROBLEM %}

Problem: {{ include.data.attributes.PROBLEM | xml_escape }}

{%- endif -%} {%- assign reference_links = "" | split: "" -%} {%- for link in include.data.attributes.links -%} {%- if link != include.data.attributes.PROBLEM -%} {%- assign reference_links = reference_links | push: link -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- if reference_links.size >= 1 -%}

References:

    {%- for link in reference_links -%}
  • {{ link | xml_escape }}
    • {%- endfor -%}
{%- endif -%}
{% if include.data.pathExtension == "hpp" %} {%- endif -%}
